Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Legacy Optometrist to get the job done right.

“After years of struggling with irritated eyes every spring, Dr. Martinez diagnosed my meibomian gland dysfunction. The LipiScan showed exactly what was wrong, and their customized treatment plan got me through pollen season without constantly rubbing my eyes. Even advised me on home humidifier settings for my Church Hill row house.”

Marcus T. Dry Eye Treatment
Mar 15, 2025

“As a marathon runner training along Monument Avenue, I needed contacts that wouldn't dry out. The team tested several options during my actual runs and found ones that stay comfortable even in Richmond's humidity. They even showed me how to clean them properly with our water hardness.”

Lauren H. Contact Lens Fitting
Apr 22, 2025

“Our second grader was struggling in school until Legacy discovered she needed prism lenses. The bilingual staff made her comfortable, and they coordinated directly with her Richmond Public School teacher. Now she's reading at grade level - we're so grateful.”

Javier R. Pediatric Eye Care
Jan 10, 2025

“When I got construction debris in my eye during my Scott's Addition loft renovation, they saw me within the hour. Removed the particle safely and provided follow-up care to prevent infection. Their knowledge of local construction materials helped guide treatment.”

Naomi W. Emergency Eye Care
May 3, 2025

“Most thorough eye exam I've ever had in Richmond. They explained how my new glasses prescription would help with computer work at my VCU job and night driving on 95. Caught early signs of cataracts I didn't know I had.”

Thomas K. Comprehensive Eye Exams
Nov 18, 2024

“After other optometrists failed, Legacy fit me with scleral lenses that finally work with my irregular cornea (from a childhood accident at Kings Dominion). Life-changing for my work at the Virginia Museum of Fine Arts.”

Priya S. Contact Lens Fitting
Mar 1, 2025
Legacy Optometrist

Trusted optometry professionals serving Richmond, VA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-opt-r94
